allow: Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose up -d 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose logs backend 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose exec backend python -c "
from database import SessionLocal
from models import ImportAPIKey
db = SessionLocal\(\)
keys = db.query\(ImportAPIKey\).all\(\)
print\(f'ImportAPIKey table exists with {len\(keys\)} records'\)
print\(f'Columns: {[c.name for c in ImportAPIKey.__table__.columns]}'\)
db.close\(\)
")
Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose restart backend && sleep 3)

Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && sleep 3 && docker compose exec backend python -c "
from database import SessionLocal
from models import ImportAPIKey
db = SessionLocal\(\)
keys = db.query\(ImportAPIKey\).all\(\)
print\(f'✓ ImportAPIKey table exists'\)
print\(f'✓ Columns: {[c.name for c in ImportAPIKey.__table__.columns]}'\)
db.close\(\)
")
